content_body: Hi Gary, I just returned from celebrating my 50th birthday in the amazing Fallen Timber Lodge. I can’t even begin to tell you how much we enjoyed our stay in that beautiful lodge. As you can see we have already reserved it again in September for another birthday. I will certainly share with my co-workers here at Delta what beautiful properties you have and hopefully steer some more business your way. Thanks again for everything and we look forward to our next visit. Saw my first snowfall at this cabin. Came with family and friends, went snowboarding, played pool…Thanks for the great memories. We all had a great vacation lounging around. Thank God I didn’t haven my baby after walking down to the river! Some of us saw snow for the first time, and some of us saw snow again, but 13 years later. Thanks for a great vacation.
title: Birthday Celebration In North Georgia
